lightsail.distribution.headerobject.Head.Description: The specific headers to forward to your distribution's origin.

lightsail.distribution.headerobject.Opti.Description: The headers that you want your distribution to forward to your origin. Your distribution caches your content based on these headers.  Use one of the following configurations for your distribution:  +  ** `all` ** - Forwards all headers to your origin..+  ** `none` ** - Forwards only the default headers.+  ** `allow-list` ** - Forwards only the headers that you specify using the `HeadersAllowList` parameter.
